{{Quote|Looks like Ackbar hasn't reached Kessel yet. We need to get him off that Star Destroyer before it's too late.|Han Solo|<ref name="fug" />}}
A '''space battle''' was fought over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Around [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]], shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Alliance [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], along with a number of other Rebels, was [[Skirmish over Saleucami|captured]] by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] during a mission to the [[Saleucami system/Legends|Saleucami system]]. Ackbar was sold to the Empire and was later [[Transport/Legends|transported]] under heavy Imperial guard to the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|prison colony]] on Kessel for interrogation. When [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] discovered that the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] Admiral had been taken captive, they dispatched a Rebel [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] and [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]]—the Alliance's new elite fighting force—to [[Space warfare/Legends|ambush]] the Imperial fleet holding Ackbar in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] over Kessel.

Under the command of former [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]–turned–Rebel [[Commander/Legends|Commanders]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Col Serra]], Renegade [[Squadron/Legends|Squadron]] destroyed the [[Comm unit/Legends|communications array]] on the [[Unidentified Imperial-class Star Destroyer (Kessel)|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] where Ackbar was being held and additionally incapacitated two [[Victory II-class frigate|''Victory II''-class frigates]]. After [[Starfighter combat/Legends|dogfighting]] Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and [[Bomber/Legends|bombers]], they boarded the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], broke the [[Prisoner/Legends|captive]] Ackbar out of [[Prison/Legends|prison]], and transported him to safety. After the fleet jumped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], Renegade Squadron decided to launch a [[Mission to Mos Eisley (Galactic Civil War)|mission]] to liberate the rest of the Rebels that had been captured in the [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] [[Star system/Legends|system]].

==Prelude==
{{Quote|Ackbar was vital to the Alliance, the best battle tactician we had. We had to get him back. Information from Alliance command was that he was being held aboard a Star Destroyer, en route to the Imperial prison colonies on Kessel.|Col Serra|<ref name="fug" />}}
Around [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Battle of the Graveyard|recovered]] a [[Datacron/Legends|data holocron]] that contained prospective locations for a new Rebel stronghold to replace the Alliance's recently [[Evacuation of Yavin|lost]] [[Great Temple/Legends|main base]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] assigned [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] to take a small [[Scout/Legends|scout]] party to research [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]], one of the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] on the data list. However, when Ackbar and his small team arrived in the [[Saleucami system/Legends|Saleucami system]], they were [[Skirmish over Saleucami|ambushed]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']]. Ackbar's [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|transport]] was quickly disabled, and he and his crew were captured by Fett. The [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunter soon sold Ackbar to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], while the rest of his crew were given over to the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]].<ref name="fug" />

Ackbar—considered a valuable leader and a [[Alliance Military/Legends|military]] genius amongst the Alliance—was placed aboard an [[Unidentified Imperial-class Star Destroyer (Kessel)|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] under heavy guard and set to be [[Transport/Legends|transported]] to the Empire's [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|prison colony]] on the planet [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] for interrogation. When the Alliance learned that Ackbar had been captured, it quickly dispatched a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], along with its new elite fighting force, [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]], to intercept the Imperial fleet holding Ackbar over Kessel. A group composed of former [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and criminals under the command of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]–turned–Rebel [[Commander/Legends|Commanders]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Col Serra]], Renegade Squadron was ordered to board the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] containing Ackbar and free the Admiral. The Rebels believed that if they did not rescue Ackbar in [[Time/Legends|time]], he would break under Imperial [[Torture/Legends|torture]], and all of the Alliance's secrets would be in jeopardy.<ref name="fug" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|Thank you! Now, we must find our way back off this Star Destroyer.|Admiral Ackbar, upon being rescued by Renegade Squadron|<ref name="fug" />}}
[[File:RenegadeKessel.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Renegade Squadron engages the Imperial fleet over Kessel.]]
The Alliance fleet, composed of a [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Cruiser]] and a pair of [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigates]], jumped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] over Kessel just as the Imperial fleet entered the [[Kessel system/Legends|system]]. Renegade Squadron launched its [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] from the Mon Calamari Cruiser's [[Hangar/Legends|hangar bay]], including [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]], [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]], and [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] fighters, as well as Solo's personal [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. The Renegades began to [[Space warfare/Legends|attack]] the incoming Imperials, with Serra ordering them to destroy the [[Comm unit/Legends|communications array]] on the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] holding Ackbar, thus preventing any Imperial reinforcements from being called. During the Renegades' initial sweep, they were able to wipe out the Star Destroyer's comm array, as well as incapacitate both of the [[Victory II-class frigate|''Victory II''-class frigates]] escorting the larger Star Destroyer by disabling their [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. With the [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]] unable to defend the fleet, the Star Destroyer proceeded to launch its complement of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]], [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|Bombers]], and [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|Interceptors]] to fight off the assaulting Rebel forces. Renegade Squadron [[Starfighter combat/Legends|engaged]] the Imperial fighters, quickly dispatching six of the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] Fighters.<ref name="fug" />

With the Imperial starfighters neutralized and the Imperial frigates no longer a threat, Solo ordered a member of Renegade Squadron to gather a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] from their hangar and use it to send a boarding party—made up of [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel troopers]], [[Rebel Vanguard/Legends|vanguards]], and [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Soldier/Legends|warriors]]—onto the Star Destroyer and free Ackbar. The Rebels were able to land the gunship inside the Star Destroyer's hangar, and the boarding team engaged the ship's [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] crew, forcing its way deeper into the Imperial vessel until it found Ackbar, who was [[Prisoner/Legends|held]] in a small room near the hangar.<ref name="fug" />

Escorting the Mon Calamari back to their gunship, the Renegades found that they were unable to leave, as the Imperials had deployed a [[Force field/Legends|force field]] around the [[Magnetic field/Legends|magnetic containment field]] of the hangar, sealing the Rebels inside. From his command post, Serra managed to locate a [[Force-field generator|shield generator]] at the side of the Imperial launch bay powering the [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] and [[Comlink/Legends|radioed]] its location to the boarding party. One of the Renegades destroyed the generator, allowing the Rebels and Ackbar to get into their transport and flee the Star Destroyer. Once Ackbar was safely aboard the Mon Calamari Cruiser, Solo ordered his forces away from Kessel and to jump into the safety of hyperspace.<ref name="fug" />

==Aftermath==
When Solo and his fleet returned to Alliance High Command, Ackbar reported to those present what had led to his capture and the events surrounding his [[Prison/Legends|imprisonment]]. The Mon Calamari Admiral informed the Rebel leaders that Fett had not given the rest of the captured scouting party to the Empire, but had brought them elsewhere. Using his knowledge from his days as a smuggler, Serra concluded that the bounty hunter had sold the captured Rebels to the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] slave market on Tatooine. As a result, Renegade Squadron soon launched an [[Mission to Mos Eisley (Galactic Civil War)|attack]] on the Hutts' slave pens in the Tatooine [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] to free the captured soldiers.<ref name="fug" />

[[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, after the formation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tionne Solusar]] tracked down Col Serra to gather information about Renegade Squadron for her [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Jedi Archives]]. Serra told the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] about many of the group's battles and exploits, including the rescue of Ackbar at Kessel.<ref name="fug" />

==Behind the scenes==
The battle of Kessel has only appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'', released on [[October 9]], [[2008]], which tells the history and feats of Renegade Squadron during the Galactic Civil War. The battle itself makes up the fourth level in the game's campaign mode, in which the player, as a member of Renegade Squadron, must assist in rescuing Ackbar from Imperial custody. The player's main objectives in the level include taking out the Star Destroyer's communications, shooting down six TIE Fighters, disabling the ''Victory''-class frigates' turrets, and boarding the Star Destroyer and freeing Ackbar.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'' {{1st}}
